title: ast.symbol_replace request
description: Locate a named symbol in `source` and return the rewritten text with that symbol's lines replaced by `new_text`. Mirrors Swift `SymbolOperations.replace`.

symbol_name.description: Symbol to replace. Optionally prefixed with a single container, e.g. `Greeter.greet`.

new_text.description: Replacement text spliced in for the symbol's full preamble + signature + body.
